title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXIV. Riddles.
content:
[Coals.]

        Black we are, but much admired;
        Men seek for us till they are tired.
        We tire the horse, but comfort man
        Tell me this riddle if you can.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCXIV. Riddles.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
